title: The search for Angel Attack
wikitext:
[]: The search for Angel Attack             Quote Post by GoodieGalactic » Sat Oct 26, 2019 3:48 am I wasn't sure where to post this so "Chit-Chat" it is! Alright so ever since I finished watching the Netflix series I've been hooked on the soundtrack especially Angel Attack Now seeing as I play guitar I took a snoop around the internet hoping to find some sort of link taking me to the tabs but so far I have found nothing I come to you, fellow Eva Geeks, to ask for help on searching for the guitar tabs for Angel Attack...if it even exists Thanks -3-

[]: Re: The search for Angel Attack             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Oct 27, 2019 5:51 am Google pointed me at this (but my antivirus package gave me a warning): http://www.tablatures.tk/download.php?id=NTQ5NjA=&page=1

Article: The search for Angel Attack
[]: The search for Angel Attack             Quote Post by GoodieGalactic » Sat Oct 26, 2019 3:48 am I wasn't sure where to post this so "Chit-Chat" it is! Alright so ever since I finished watching the Netflix series I've been hooked on the soundtrack especially Angel Attack Now seeing as I play guitar I took a snoop around the internet hoping to find some sort of link taking me to the tabs but so far I have found nothing I come to you, fellow Eva Geeks, to ask for help on searching for the guitar tabs for Angel Attack...if it even exists Thanks -3-
